description.content: Marketer-side lookup for one project. Current backend returns only the current marketer targets inside that project, not team-wide targets.
Updates target status for the target owner only. In the current backend, only the assigned marketer can change status.
Marks a target as completed for the target owner only. In the current backend, leader does not update target status here.

Target-related Postman collection extracted from the real Laravel backend after the team-based target flow update.

Auth:
- POST /api/login
- GET /api/user
- POST /api/logout

Core target APIs:
- GET /api/sales/targets/my
- GET /api/sales/targets/by-project/{contractId}
- POST /api/sales/targets
- PATCH /api/sales/targets/{id}

Team-based source of truth for leader target setup:
- GET /api/sales/team/projects
- GET /api/sales/team/members
- GET /api/sales/projects/{contractId}/units

Current backend behavior:
- Sales leader sees only completed projects linked to the leader team by project management via contract_team.
- Sales leader can create a target only for a sales marketer in the same team.
- Target can be project-level or unit-level.
- Sales marketer sees only targets assigned to them personally.
- Leader view of /api/sales/targets/my returns project cards (item_type = project_assignment) sourced from PM team linkage, not sales_project_assignments.

Suggested order:
1. Login - Sales Leader
2. Get Team Projects
3. Get Team Members
4. Get Project Units
5. Create Target
6. Get Targets By Project - Leader
7. Login - Sales Marketer
8. Get My Targets - Marketer View
9. Update Target Status
